name: ZIP Utilities
summary: Shared ZIP packaging helpers for staged payloads and user scripts.

apiReference.name: Libraries.zip.createZip
apiReference.description: Create a store-only ZIP archive from a directory tree in the remote runtime.

apiReference.name: Libraries.zip.crc32
apiReference.description: Compute a CRC-32 checksum for an ArrayBuffer or typed-array buffer.

apiReference.name: zip.createZip
apiReference.description: Create a ZIP archive through the module form of the ZIP library.
